name: Alamos Gold Inc.
description: Alamos Gold Inc. is a Canadian-based intermediate gold producer with diversified production from three operating mines in North America. This includes the Young-Davidson and Island Gold mines in northern Ontario, Canada, and the Mulatos mine in Sonora, Mexico. The company also maintains a strong portfolio of growth projects in Canada, Mexico, Turkey, and the United States. Alamos is committed to sustainable development and creating value for all stakeholders through low-cost production and a disciplined approach to capital allocation and exploration.

investment_theses.company_type: Mid-Tier Gold Producer / North American Focus
